questions.question: Describe the time complexity of Brute Force String Matching algorithm. How does it compare to other string matching algorithms like Knuth-Morris-Pratt?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of time complexity and its implications on algorithm performance

questions.question: Write a step-by-step pseudocode for the Sequential Search String Matching algorithm, assuming the target string is 'abc' and the text is 'abcdefg'.
questions.hint: Use descriptive variable names and include comments to clarify the pseudocode

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of using Brute Force String Matching algorithm for large-scale string searching applications? Discuss the trade-offs between algorithm efficiency and computational complexity.
questions.hint: Explain the concept of scalability and its impact on algorithm design
